commercialRule: Inventra updates internally; users do not open GitHub, JSON, or choose files.
releaseNotes: Fixed EPERM update download failures by moving updater downloads from Documents to the app userData folder.
Added a temp-folder fallback for update downloads.
Stopped reusing one static .exe.download file; each download now uses a unique temporary file.
Keeps installer launch and commercial seamless update behavior unchanged.
No SQL, app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater UI redesign changed.
